mapper.select: SELECT id, name, enabled, sort_order, base_url, api_kind, model, effort, api_key, updated_at FROM ai_provider ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, enabled, sort_order, base_url, api_kind, model, effort, api_key, updated_at FROM ai_provider WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, enabled, sort_order, base_url, api_kind, model, effort, api_key, updated_at FROM ai_provider WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_provider ( name, enabled, sort_order, base_url, api_kind, model, effort, api_key, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKind}, #{model}, #{effort}, #{apiKey}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_provider SET name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_kind = #{apiKind}, model = #{model}, effort = #{effort}, api_key = #{apiKey}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
